name: Nature Machine Intelligence
scope: Fundamental and applied AI research, machine learning, and their impacts on science and society.

name: Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR)
scope: All areas of artificial intelligence, including automated reasoning, cognitive modeling, natural language processing, and computer vision.

name: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence (TPAMI)
scope: Computer vision, image understanding, pattern analysis, and machine learning.

name: Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL)
scope: Natural language processing and computational linguistics.

name: ACM Transactions on Computer Systems (TOCS)
scope: Design, implementation, and evaluation of computer systems, networks, and distributed systems.

name: IEEE Transactions on Software Engineering (TSE)
scope: Software engineering, including requirements, design, testing, and maintenance.

name: ACM Transactions on Graphics (TOG)
scope: Computer graphics, rendering, animation, and geometric modeling.

name: Bioinformatics
scope: Computational biology and bioinformatics.

name: Journal of Machine Learning Research (JMLR)
scope: Machine learning, statistical learning theory, and data mining.

name: IEEE/ACM Transactions on Networking (TON)
scope: Computer and communication networks.

name: Artificial Intelligence in Medicine
scope: Application of AI in healthcare, clinical decision support, and medical imaging.

name: ACM Transactions on Information Systems (TOIS)
scope: Information retrieval, search engines, and recommender systems.

name: IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS)
scope: Information security, cryptography, and forensics.

name: Journal of Computer Security
scope: Computer security, access control, and formal methods in security.

name: International Journal of Robotics Research (IJRR)
scope: Robotics, kinematics, dynamics, and robot control.

name: ACM Transactions on Human-Computer Interaction (TOCHI)
scope: Human-computer interaction, user interfaces, and usability.

name: Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery
scope: Data mining algorithms, machine learning for data mining, and big data analytics.

name: IEEE Transactions on Parallel and Distributed Systems (TPDS)
scope: Parallel computing, distributed algorithms, and grid computing.

name: ACM Transactions on Database Systems (TODS)
scope: Database systems, data models, query processing, and transaction management.

name: Computer Networks
scope: Computer networking and telecommunications.

name: Journal of Neural-Symbolic Computing
scope: Integration of neural networks and symbolic logic, hybrid AI models, and interpretable deep learning.

name: Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)
scope: Machine learning, neural networks, deep learning, and their mathematical foundations. The premier venue for foundational and applied advances in AI.

name: International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML)
scope: All aspects of machine learning, including theory, algorithms, and applications. Covers optimization, probabilistic methods, and deep architectures.

name: International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)
scope: Deep learning and representation learning, including novel architectures, training techniques, and theoretical analysis.

name: Association for Computational Linguistics (ACL)
scope: Natural language processing and computational linguistics research, including parsing, machine translation, language generation, and semantics.

name: Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP)
scope: Empirical and data-driven approaches to natural language processing, including neural models for translation, summarization, and language understanding.
